# Code Of Conduct

This project expects respectful, constructive collaboration.

## Expected Behavior

- Be clear, patient, and technical.
- Focus criticism on the work, not the person.
- Assume public project spaces may be read by contributors with different backgrounds and experience levels.
- Protect private data, credentials, and deployment-specific information.

## Unacceptable Behavior

- Harassment, threats, or discriminatory language.
- Publishing private personal, client, federation, production, or security-sensitive information.
- Repeated off-topic disruption of project spaces.

## Enforcement

Maintainers may remove content, close issues or pull requests, block participants, or take other reasonable action to protect the project and its contributors.
